mandatory_anchors.injection_phrase: visible skin pores under natural light, slight texture variation across nose bridge and cheeks
2-3 stray baby hairs along hairline, single flyaway crossing forehead
subtle under-eye creasing, faint bluish tint beneath lower lash line
slight redness on nose tip, mild discoloration on chin, natural skin unevenness
fabric weave visible on clothing, natural wrinkle at elbow crease, slight lint
ambient dust particles in light beam, background grain consistent with location
soft shadow under chin, uneven highlight on forehead, one side slightly cooler lit
slight chromatic aberration at frame edges, subtle lens barrel distortion
natural nail with faint cuticle line, slight shine variation across nail surface
necklace chain sitting naturally with slight sag, earring back visible behind lobe

enforcement: ALL 10 anchors must appear in Layer 5 (Realism Injection) of every prompt. Omission of any anchor invalidates the prompt.
